notes: Rerun E007 as E007A under the new target-maintenance-margin policy. Baseline is fixed from the E004-passed lon15 buy setting. E007 is no longer risk_fraction optimization. Evaluate target maintenance margins in ascending order [150, 180, 200]; maintenance_below_100_count > 0 is immediate fail; stop_triggered or maintenance_below_130_count > 0 requires stepping up to the next candidate. Ignore the 120% line for adoption. Interpret min_maintenance_margin_pct and below counts as hypothetical maintenance margin if each trade immediately reaches SL.
